name_cn:
Beige·
24ss New Shopping Bag
A unique fusion of art and personality. Y's always has a keen eye, winning the hearts of top fashion icons. The Y-shaped calfskin design is eye-catching, giving a casual, lazy, yet full-of-personality vibe. Oversized capacity, fits an iPad or laptop. Retro and minimalist design, great for styling, stylish and photogenic!
Style No.: 817602
Size: 38-50×33×16cm
